title: Lead Instructional Designer at Aakash Educational Services

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Aakash Educational Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Aakash Educational Services family as a Instructional Designer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Aakash Educational Services:
Aakash Educational Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services!
